description_long: This handcart features a robust rectangular cargo bed with raised side panels and a flat, solid platform for carrying goods. It is supported by four large spoked wheels, two on each side, which are mounted at the corners for stability and ease of movement. The front of the cart is equipped with a simple, upright backrest and a step for easy access, while the rear is open for loading and unloading. The structure appears to be primarily constructed from metal, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance suitable for urban environments. The design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements, focusing on function and durability. The overall color scheme is a combination of dark gray and black, contributing to its practical, work-oriented look.
description: A sturdy, four-wheeled handcart with raised side panels, a flat cargo bed, and a simple upright backrest, finished in dark gray and black metal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upright backrest, raised side panels, and the step at the base for access.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the cargo bed, the large spoked wheels, and the open rear for loading.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the flat, solid cargo platform and the arrangement of the side panels and backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the wheels, side panels, and open rear, with the backrest visible.
